title: GeneralPreferences Object
description: Provides access to the general preferences.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

properties.name: activeUserInterfaceTheme
properties.description: Gets the active user interface theme. This property is only different from userInterfaceTheme in the case the theme is DeviceUserInterfaceTheme. In that case the theme used will be returned.

properties.name: areAutodesk360NotificationsShown
properties.description: Gets and sets if Autodesk 360 notifications are shown.

properties.name: areInCommandErrorsAndWarningsShown
properties.description: Gets and sets if in command errors and warnings are shown.

properties.name: areTipsAndTricksShown
properties.description: Gets and sets if in command tips and tricks are shown.

properties.name: areTooltipsShown
properties.description: Gets and sets if tooltips are shown.

properties.name: automateVersioningTimeInterval
properties.description: Gets and sets the interval, in minutes, for automatic versioning.

properties.name: defaultModelingOrientation
properties.description: Gets and sets the default for which direction is considered "up".

properties.name: defaultOrbit
properties.description: Get and sets the type of orbit.

properties.name: graphicsDriver
properties.description: Gets and sets the graphics driver used to display the graphics.

properties.name: isAutomaticSaveOnCloseEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if the file is automatically saved on close.

properties.name: isAutomaticVersioningEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if a version of the file is automatically saved using a background thread.

properties.name: isCameraPivotEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets if zoom and orbit commands use camera pivot point for transition.

properties.name: isCommandPromptShown
properties.description: Gets and sets if the command prompt is shown.

properties.name: isDefaultMeasureShown
properties.description: Gets and sets if the default measure is shown.

properties.name: isGestureBasedViewNavigationUsed
properties.description: Gets and sets if gesture based view navigation is used.

properties.name: isHangDetectionEnabled
properties.description: Gets and sets whether hang detection is enabled. This is a Windows only setting. If True, Fusion will detect when a task processes for longer than a specific time. A dialog is displayed if a hang is detected, allowing the user to continue processing or stop Fusion and send an error report.

properties.name: isSkipCreationWhenLiveUpdate
properties.description: Gets and sets if the creation of launch items should be skipped for live update.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: isZoomDirectionReversed
properties.description: Gets and sets if the direction of the zoom is reversed.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: offlineCachePeriod
properties.description: Gets and sets the length of time, in days, that the offline cache of a document will remain.

properties.name: panZoomOrbitShortcuts
properties.description: Gets and sets how pan, zoom, and orbit should behave.

properties.name: userInterfaceTheme
properties.description: Gets and sets which color theme is used by the user interface.

properties.name: userLanguage
properties.description: Gets and sets the current language. Setting the language does not take effect until the next time Fusion is started.

activeUserInterfaceTheme.title: GeneralPreferences.activeUserInterfaceTheme Property
activeUserInterfaceTheme.description: Gets the active user interface theme. This property is only different from userInterfaceTheme in the case the theme is DeviceUserInterfaceTheme. In that case the theme used will be returned.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = generalPreferences_var.activeUserInterfaceTheme

classType.title: GeneralPreferences.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

syntax.python: returnValue = adsk.core.GeneralPreferences.classType()
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = adsk::core::GeneralPreferences::classType();

classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.
